content:
Buying health insurance for parents above 60 is one of the most common requests I get from clients in Gorakhpur. And it's one of the trickiest to get right. Three things can make a senior citizen health plan almost useless: waiting periods for pre-existing diseases, room rent sub-limits, and co-payment clauses. You need to know these before you buy.

Pre-existing disease waiting period: Most plans have a two to four year waiting period for diseases your parent already has, like diabetes, blood pressure, or a past heart condition. During this period, any claim related to those conditions is rejected. Look for plans with the shortest waiting periods. Star Health's Senior Citizens Red Carpet plan is popular partly because it has no pre-existing disease waiting period for basic inpatient treatment.

Room rent sub-limits: Many senior citizen plans cap the room rent at Rs 3,000 or Rs 5,000 per day. In a private hospital in Gorakhpur, a general ward costs Rs 2,500 to Rs 4,000 per day and an ICU can cost Rs 8,000 to Rs 15,000. If your room rent exceeds the cap, the insurer proportionately reduces all other claim amounts too. Choose a plan with no room rent limit or a high limit.

Co-payment: Many senior citizen plans require the insured to pay 20 to 30 percent of every claim out of pocket. A Rs 2 lakh hospital bill with 20 percent co-pay means you still pay Rs 40,000. Star Health Senior Citizens Red Carpet has a 30 percent co-payment. Niva Bupa (formerly Max Bupa) and HDFC Ergo Optima Secure do not have mandatory co-payments.

My recommendations for 2026. For a 65-year-old in Gorakhpur, Star Health Senior Citizens Red Carpet at Rs 5 lakh cover costs approximately Rs 24,000 to Rs 32,000 per year. No pre-existing waiting, but 30 percent co-pay. Niva Bupa ReAssure at Rs 5 lakh costs Rs 28,000 to Rs 38,000 per year with no co-payment and a better restore benefit.

Call me at 9415313434 and tell me your parent's age and any existing conditions. I'll compare exact premiums across three plans in ten minutes.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to estimate health insurance costs.
contentHi:
60+ माता-पिता के लिए स्वास्थ्य बीमा में 3 खतरे: 1) प्री-एग्जिस्टिंग वेटिंग पीरियड 2) रूम रेंट सब-लिमिट 3) को-पेमेंट।

Star Health Senior Red Carpet: प्री-एग्जिस्टिंग वेटिंग नहीं, लेकिन 30% को-पेमेंट। Rs 5 लाख कवर: Rs 24,000-32,000/वर्ष।

Niva Bupa ReAssure: को-पेमेंट नहीं, बेहतर Restore। Rs 28,000-38,000/वर्ष।

9415313434 पर कॉल करें - 10 मिनट में 3 प्लानों की तुलना।
